content:
# Green Fee-Free Account Terms

## Account Profile
Green Fee-Free Account is a Northstar Bank deposit account for personal customers. It is classified as a checking account, so use it only when the customer is asking about everyday transaction banking rather than a savings product. See "Checking Account Comparison Guide" when comparing this option with other checking accounts.

## Pricing and Balance Requirements
- Monthly maintenance fee: 0.
- Balance required to waive the monthly fee: 0.
- Minimum opening deposit: 0.
- Annual percentage yield: 0.01.

Because the listed monthly fee and waiver balance are the same, do not tell customers they must maintain a balance to avoid a monthly maintenance charge. Do not add overdraft, paper statement, card, or transfer fees from other materials to this product summary.

## Early Closure
If the Green Fee-Free Account is closed within 30 days after opening, the early closure fee is 15. For employee handling steps and closure verification, see "Internal: Deposit Account Closure Policy".
title: Green Fee-Free Account Terms
